summary: Iteration 68: Verified isSimpleFrontendEdit() fix for Creative Brief prompts. All 10 unit tests passed. The fix correctly prevents Creative Brief prompts from being misclassified as 'simple frontend edits', ensuring they go through the multi-file propose_plan flow instead of directEditMode.

issues: Supabase auth lock warning in console - non-blocking, related to React Strict Mode

critical_code_review_comments: intents.js line 460: Creative Brief marker check 'Build this project now with COMPLETE' returns FALSE - FIX VERIFIED
intents.js line 463: Long message check (>600 chars) returns FALSE - FIX VERIFIED
intents.js lines 445-448: COMPLEX_DISQUALIFIERS include 'production-ready pages', 'SEPARATE COMPONENT FILES', 'Pages needed' - FIX VERIFIED
message-stream.js line 294: isSimpleFrontendEdit() is called correctly to determine directEditMode
message-stream.js lines 328-331: ModeDecision log shows directEditMode, isBriefBuild, isNewProjectBuild for debugging

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login flow works correctly, dashboard loads

context_for_next_testing_agent: The isSimpleFrontendEdit() fix is verified. Unit tests confirm: (1) Creative Brief prompts with marker return FALSE, (2) Long messages >600 chars return FALSE, (3) Simple requests like 'build a landing page' still return TRUE, (4) COMPLEX_DISQUALIFIERS correctly block multi-page indicators. The fix ensures Creative Brief prompts go through propose_plan flow (usePlanMode=true) instead of directEditMode.

frontend_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login with REDACTED_LEAKED_USER works correctly

frontend_tests.no_errors: PASS - No error messages on page

creative_brief_marker_check.code: if (/Build this project now with COMPLETE/i.test(text)) return false
